entry.title: Re: Task 7 - Using CQL in an unbound function implementation (July Developer Challenge - "Rever

Hello DJ @qmacro,

Tried the repl to build the query and it was fun. Never had to set the debugger to dig into any error.

REPL is a great find.

ID: "f40ee4c1-8b95-4591-a0cc-4590cebb96ec",
task: "northbreeze-productinfo",
result: "PASS",

modifiedAt: "2024-07-23T09:49:27.657Z",

communityid: "cguttikonda24"
}
]

entry.title: Re: Accessing long text of SAP Master data Objects or fields in S4 Hana through a CDS View
entry.content:
@koyaajai @fischerm, I found a way for program ESH_SR_LTXT_REPLICATE to use other Text Objects. Do note however that this is not recommended by SAP and is explicitly stated in OSS note 3048704. So, only do it with that in mind.

The text objects that it can process are defined in view ESH_V_LT_CDSASOC. These entries are CDS-entities that have an association to I_TextObjectPlainLongText. To be able to process texts that are not defined by SAP there, do the following:

  1. Create a custom CDS-entity in ADT that does an association to I_TextObjectPlainLongText. You can check the association done by I_Product as reference.
  2. After creating and activating the CDS-entity, add a new entry to ESH_V_LT_CDSASOC for the CDS-entity that you created. This will ask you for a customizing Transport Request.
  3. Run program ESH_SR_LTXT_REPLICATE in Test mode using your other/custom text object to confirm that it was able to pick-up the data and process.
  4. Once the test run looks okay, proceed using the Update Run option.

entry.title: Re: Inspection lot status CRTD CHCR SPRQ
entry.content: Hi, Please check the inspection setup for inspection type 03/04 etc. If the "Manual sample calc." option is selected in the material master, then you need to perform the manual sample calculation in the inspection lot. Thank you.

entry.title: Flexible Workflow PO - How to Skip/Auto Approve
entry.content:
Hello,

In the flexible workflow for Purchase order, how can we skip/auto approve if the approver repeats more then once in workflow ?

Assume in the WF, we have 6 level approvers, in which at level 2 (Dept. Head) & level 4 (CFO) its same user,  when the User at level 2 approves, system should either Auto Approve/Skip the level 4 in the WF process.

Similary it should work in the Substituion scenario also.

entry.title: Re: Performance Issue After Converting SAC Stories to Opt...
entry.content:
Hello, Yes we had the same situation.

To obtain same or better performance, we had to analyse the performance of all scripts (performance analyzer).

We didn't use the view port loading, we only use the background loading process.

Are you using scripts too or simple stories ?

entry.title: Re: Extending Generated (Function Module based) IDOC
entry.content:
Hi @AbinashNanda ,

Thanks for the detailed explanation.

I would like to clarify one doubt. Are we able to generate(change/edit the interface) it only one time using the same IDOc type . When I am trying to generate it second time with additional fields in the complex data type ,the IDOC types are not generating and it shows "IDOC Type XXXX is current version and has not been generated".

Thanks,

Jibin

entry.title: Re: Feature Showcase App - Quick View Facet
entry.content: Dear Nold, Can you please post the full blog for people's reference

entry.title: Form 16 Annexure is not displaying not displaying data correctly
entry.content:
Hi All ,

In my company , there is an employee who was working on contract . His contract expired on August 2023 and we rehired him by renewing contract in Oct 2023 .

the tcode pc00_m40_f16 is showing 2 document howver the annexure is showing wages only from month APR 2023 to Aug  2023 it not showing amount of wages from month Oct 2023  to March 2024 in either of form print out .

This scenario is common for us .the system was working fine for year 22-23 . But this time it is behaving like this .

Is there any way to generate annexure for month OCT 23- Mar 24 also .

Thanks in Advance ,

Shikha Singh Chauhan

entry.title: Re: S/4 Purchase Order Flexible Workflow: Agent Determination by BADI
entry.content:
Hello

How can i skip/auto approve if the approver repeats more then once in the workflow ? 

Eg: if there is a same approver at level 2 & level 4, if the user approves at level 2 system should auto approve the level 4 also.

entry.title: sap mobile start - how to create a tile to launch custom app developed using mdk in sap bas?
entry.content:
I have followed few developer tutorials:

https://developers.sap.com/mission.mobile-dev-kit-enhance.html

https://developers.sap.com/mission.mobile-dev-kit-enhance.html

https://developers.sap.com/mission.mobile-dev-kit-level-up.html

Following above tutorials I created many mdk apps with systems SampleServiceV4 & swagger_petstore

I googled a lot but surprisingly I did not see any blog explaining creating tile selecting 'system' for sap mobile start

this below blog has shown creating tile selecting "no system"

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-mobile-start-adding-native-apps-to-your-content/ba-p/13515218

 

Please help in this regard.

@dennis_koehler 

@SAPSupport

entry.title: Re: Performance Issue After Converting SAC Stories to Opt...
entry.content:
Thank you for sharing your experience with converting SAC stories to the optimized design. It's interesting to hear about the performance changes you've observed. There could be various reasons for the increased load times, such as differences in how data is handled or changes in visualization complexity. I'm curious to know if others have encountered similar issues and what solutions might be available.

Kind regards,

Sydney Digital Agency

entry.title: [BYD] how to find out who registered the contract and project
entry.content:
Please tell me how to find out who registered the contract and project.
Not the person responsible, but the person who registered.

Since it is possible to know the registrants of orders and purchase orders, I think it is possible to check the above two items (contracts and projects), but I could not find them by myself.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: [BYD] how to find out who registered the contract and...
entry.content:
Dear customer,

 

According to 2665406 - How to Find the Creator of the Copy From a Contract, the identity of the person who creates a document is not stored.

Different from purchasing contract, the "created by" field isn't exposed on the UI (isn't part of the standard) as it's a technical field and not necessarily related to business data.

If client would like to know creator of a specific contract, the creation identity of the person who created a document can be found in the backend on the ROOT node of the CUSTOMER_CONTRACT BO.

 

Regards,
Carrie

SAP Technical Support, Public Cloud ERP

entry.title: Re: SM20 audit log - RFC/CPIC logon failed errors
entry.content: @sravankumar319: Did you find any solution to this problem?

entry.title: BTP IRPA screens don't identify for other users
entry.content: When I share a project with other users, the screen doesn't identify.  It runs fine on my machine, and doesn't appear to have anything user specific in the title text that was used for the recognition criteria.

entry.title: Re: Performance Issue After Converting SAC Stories to Optimized Design Experience
entry.content: Could you please raise this to SAP via incident? Thanks.

entry.title: What replaces deprecated Scope Item 19C?
entry.content: Greetings, we are interested to learn what functionality now replaces scope item 19C which is no longer available in 2402. Can SAP please recommend the Best Practice alternative approach we should adopt to achieve similar functionality?

entry.title: Re: Delete duplicate customers in SAP CDC
entry.content:
Hi @samuelyang, I am preparing for CDC Certification and would need more of these recorded sessions, Could you please share if you have them

 

Thanks,

Ameen

entry.title: Re: Change Screen Name under Contexts
entry.content:
Hi Natalie,

If you are talking about relinking individual steps in a Guided Tour to new screen, you can do this in the Element tab of the step that must be updated.  To do this:

1. Open the Guided Tour for editing
2. Open the new application screen
3. Open the individual Guided Tour step for editing and navigate to the Element screen
4. Click the Change Screen ID button

 That will modify the context on that individual step.  You will need to update the context on the other steps that also relate to the new screen.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: What is the workaround for Quote.RefreshActions in 2.0?
entry.content:
Hi,

Following the migration guidance in Develop | SAP Help Portal, Quote.RefreshActions() has also been deprecated in Quote 2.0.

May you please describe the scenario where you need to "refresh" action condition so that we can better understand how we can help?

Best Regards,
Fancy

entry.title: how to transfer Site master with BP from S4HANA to ECC
entry.content:
Hi,

I am looking for a way to transfer site master along with BP from S4HANA Retail to ECC Retail. all comments are welcome. Thanks

entry.title: Re: Tax Code not Appearing in FB60
entry.content: Please maintain reporting country for missing Tax code in properties option of FTXP

entry.title: Posting date should be locked and future date should not be accepted in sap public cloud
entry.content: Does above will be possible in public cloud with validation or any other method? and If how I would get all details like which validations and customization are allowed in SAP PUBLIC CLOUD?

entry.title: Re: What replaces deprecated Scope Item 19C?
entry.content:
Hi,

You can find the latest deprecated scope items and their successors in What's New Viewer - SAP S/4HANA Cloud | SAP Help Portal. Alternatively, you can also access this information via Process Navigator - SAP for Me.

Based on the lists of deprecated scope items for versions 2308 and 2402, I couldn't find any reference to "19C". Could you please double-check the expected scope item ID or provide the process name for further clarification?

 

Best Regards,
Fancy

entry.title: Re: Schemes - Buy X quantity of material for free on purc...
entry.content: Hello Team, We have encountered an issue with our current free goods solution. Our client requires a more complex scenario where free goods are offered based on the combined volume of multiple products. Specifically, if products A, B, C, D, and E together reach a volume of 50 tonnes, then 10 kg of any of these products (A, B, C, D, or E) should be given for free. The existing free goods solution manages free products on a one-to-one (1:1) ratio basis, but our requirement is to aggregate the quantities of multiple products to meet the minimum order quantity and then provide a free product from any of these.

entry.title: Mass Classification of Packaged Dangerous Goods
entry.content:
In this how-to blog, we’ll guide you through the process of using the new mass classification functionality, for Dangerous Goods Management within Product Compliance, which will make your life easier. For more information about this feature, including technical information, go here. 

Use the mass functionality with Classify Selected Products in the Classify Unpackaged Dangerous Goods app, by selecting multiple packaged dangerous goods in section Related Packaged Products or Use the mass functionality with Classify Selected Products in the My Packaged Dangerous Goods app, by selecting multiple packaged dangerous goods in the worklist.

With this new feature you use mass classification when you have a product which you want to sell it in different distribution chains, but don’t want to use the same product name for all.

 

 

 

Here you have 4 versions of a 100-liter drum and a 20-liter version.

 

 

 

 

 

You have already added the compliance purposes for transport with the EU and North America.

 

 

 

 

After selecting the products, you need to fill out the first line with the correct information including Enclosure Variants and Exemption Category.

 

 

 

 

You select the line with the correct information and click on Copy.

 

 

 

 

Then you highlight the other lines to copy the information and click on Paste.

 

 

 

 

After making sure all the information is correct, in this example you must set the one product quantity to 20-liters.

 

 

 

 

Now the system will calculate dangerous goods descriptions and labeling for all the products.

 

 

 

 

 

Now you have a chance to update the Transport Permission for the compliance requirement versions in the compliance purpose.

 

 

 

 

For IATA, 100-liter drums are not allowed for transport, but the 20-liter product is allowed. You change the 4 products and set the Transport Permission to Forbidden. Finally, click on Release on the bottom.

 

 

 

Now you see that the classification for each product is set to Released.

entry.title: SAP BPA - How can I run a automation project for a long time?
entry.content:
Hello, I am currently working on an automation project that transfers web information into an Excel file.

However, after a few hours, the agent automatically disconnects, and the project exits. How can I run it for a long time without it stopping halfway?

entry.title: Re: Schemes - Buy X quantity of material for free on purc...
entry.content: In the free goods tile, only 1 Material at a time in a condition is allowed, for eg. Material X buy 10 qty and get 1 free. But if I have to add scale i.e. same Material X 20 qty and get 3 free is not allowing.

entry.title: how to settle unsettled project line items of previous closed financial year
entry.content:
Dear All,

I have an issue in SAP S/4 Hana. I found line items of a project were not settled in a prior period and financial year that is now closed (P12 FY2023).

I cannot run settlement for the current period (P7 FY2024) because the prior period P12 FY2023 is not settled. The unsettled period is already closed (Dec) and the year (2023) is closed as well. Obviously I cannot reopen  the year/period. Is there a work around to get those line items settled?

The error message I get when trying to run the settlement in the current period is;

"First Settle items from the previous year in the previous year"

Can anyone help me to advise what should I do to settle the unsettled line items of P12 FY2023?

Thank you and appreciate for your helps

entry.title: Re: What replaces deprecated Scope Item 19C?
entry.content: Hi Fancy, thanks for your quick reply. I am referring to Activity Management in Procurement (19C) which was last available in 2023 of SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud private edition. https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolS/EARL_SolS-055/2023/SolP/19C?region=AU

Hello,

1. Is it possible to do the full system restart (OS level) and then start the installation where it is getting stopped?

2. Attach the SAPINST log file

Regards

SS

entry.title: Re: Trigger a Counter based Maintenance Plan based on Usa...
entry.content: Greetings, can you share as screenshot of IP10 transaction for your maintenance plan? According to what you have written the call object should be created when the measurement document was entered for 6 "times" and IP30 was ran afterwards.

entry.title: Re: Is there any possible way to do a calculation in SAC...
entry.content: Hello, blending is available in ODE with QRC 3.2024 in graphs. A calculation using metrics from two models is possible then, too.

entry.title: Authority Check-For Cost Center Based on User name
entry.content:
Hi all, I hope all are doing well.

I'm new to  SAP ABAP.

We have requirement from our client, where a user should be restricted by the user name to a particular cost center.

For this I have created a Custom Table with fields MANDT, UNAME & KOSTL and i have assigned the cost centers based on User name.

EX:|UNAME ||KOSTL|

    USER1    CC1000

    USER1    CC2000

    USER2    CC2000

    USER3    CC3000

And also I have developed the code in standard functionality using Exits(Enhancements) EXIT_SAPLKBER_001.

But my code is restricting for all users even they are available in table also. 

Can anyone suggest me a proper approach to get a expected output.

Thanks in advance..... 

For Your Reference:

TYPES: BEGIN OF ts_z_cs_auth,
         mandt TYPE z_cs_auth-mandt,
         uname TYPE z_cs_auth-uname,
         kostl TYPE z_cs_auth-kostl,
       END OF z_ts_cs_auth.

* Internal Table
DATA: lt_user_cs TYPE TABLE OF z_ts_cs_auth.

* Work Area
DATA: ls_user_cs TYPE ts_z_cs_auth.

* Local Variables
DATA: lv_user_name       TYPE sy-uname,
      lv_cs              TYPE ts_z_cs_auth-kostl,
*      lv_message         TYPE string,
      lv_authority_check TYPE c LENGTH 1.

lv_user = sy-uname.
" Read the authorized cost centers for the user from the custom table
SELECT uname
       kostl
  INTO TABLE lt_user_cs
  FROM z_cs_auth
  WHERE uname = lv_user AND kostl = lv_cs.
IF lt_user_cs IS INITIAL.
  " No entries found for the user in the custom table
  MESSAGE e001(zuser_auth).
  EXIT.
ENDIF.

CALL FUNCTION 'AUTHORITY_CHECK'
  EXPORTING
*   NEW_BUFFERING       = 3
    user                = sy-uname
    object              = 'z_cs_auth'
    field1              = 'kostl'
    value1              = ls_user_cs-kostl
  EXCEPTIONS
    user_dont_exist     = 1
    user_is_authorized  = 2
    user_not_authorized = 3
    user_is_locked      = 4
    OTHERS              = 5.
IF sy-subrc <> 0.
* Implement suitable error handling here
  MESSAGE e002(zuser_auth).
  EXIT.
ENDIF.

entry.title: Re: Error in account determination: table T030K key 1000 BED Message no. FF709
entry.content: Please check FTXP Accounts option whether Tax accounts are maintained for all account key of that particular tax code.

entry.title: Re: Is there any possible way to do a calculation in SAC...
entry.content:
Hello @Lothar_Köder

... with "graphs" you mean: Charts / Diagrams?

Where do you know this from?

Thanks, Martin

entry.title: Re: What replaces deprecated Scope Item 19C?
entry.content:
Hi @johntebbitt,

I noticed you're discussing the Private Cloud Edition. In this context, there's no need to look at the deprecated information from the Public Cloud Edition (version ID 2402, which corresponds to a major upgrade in February 2024).

For S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition, upgrades occur once a year. Therefore, the next release is slated for late 2024. As of now, the version currently available for new provisioning in the Private Edition remains 2023, meaning 19C is still in use.

Best Regards,
Fancy

entry.title: Re: Upskill with SAP Learnings - Get free Badges - Record of Achievement
entry.content: MM related?

entry.title: Mass change product configuration setting in manny sales orders
entry.content: Hello together, how can I mass change one configuration setting for the same material in manny purchase orders? Table RCTAV. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Is there any possible way to do a calculation in SAC...
entry.content: Hello Martin, yes, I mean charts with term graph. I tested it with our preview tenant which is already on version 2024.15.1.

entry.title: Automatic supplier Validity date based on the supplier audit management on S/4 Hana
entry.content:
Hello there!
How can S/4 Hana automate the validation of supplier validity dates based on supplier audit evaluation score?

I am looking for a descriptive solution with configurations. Thanks in Advance!

entry.title: Re: What replaces deprecated Scope Item 19C?
entry.content: Hi Fancy, I understand what you are saying about private cloud edition releases. But I am working in Presales and the procurement lead times are very long. Therefore by the time we get to close the sale the new version will be available and I am asking what replaces 19C in the next release, what should we do instead?

entry.title: Transferring Measurement Document attachment to Notification
entry.content:
Hello fellow SAPiens:), 

I am currently working on the enhancement where the Plant Maintenance Notification is triggered when the Measurement Reading inside the Measurement Document (MD)is below the target reading in the Measurement Point (MP) by using User EXIT IMRC0001. This is supposed to happen when the MD is saved. This is all fine.

Another requirement is when the MD is saved the attachment inside the MD must also get transferred to the Notification 

How do I achieve this? Could anyone please provide me the details?

Regards

Deepak Doddagoudar

entry.title: Re: Dispatcher does not start after Refresh database
entry.content:
Thank you for your answer. The database and application server are on the same host and we checked with Hana Studio and all the database services are running.

We added the details of the host of the reproduction system that we backed up here, to etc/hosts file, and the following error was generated in dev_w0:

*** ERROR => Connect to database failed, rc=1, rcSQL=-10709 [dbhdbsql.cpp 620]

SQLCODE: -10709 S

QLERRTEXT : Connection failed (RTE:[89009] Socket connect timeout (60000 ms) (192.168.212.250:60650 -> sappcopy:\ 30515))

M ***LOG R19=> ThDbConnect, db_connect () [thxxtool.c 6114] M ThIErrHandle: in_ThErrHandle: 1

M *** ERROR => ThInit: db_connect (step TH_INIT, thRc ERROR-DB-CONNECT_ERROR, action STOP_WP, level 1) [thxxhead.c 2851]

Our test and production machines are not connect to each other and are not in the same network. Could this be the problem?

entry.title: Re: Delete duplicate customers in SAP CDC
entry.content:
Hi @Ameen_Shariff 

You may find the recordings of the past live sessions on the learning site, eg. the CDC Essential one: 

https://learning.sap.com/live-sessions/sap-customer-data-cloud-essentials-1

Not all the live sessions are recorded though. 

We regularly publish/update quick learning videos on the Microlearning site,  some of them are being migrated to the learning site. 

https://microlearning.opensap.com/category/SAP+Customer+Data+Cloud/173267231

BTW while learning CDC, you can try out the ILT training hands-on exercises in our LSA systems: 

https://learning.sap.com/practice-systems/sap-customer-data-cloud-implementation-training

Good luck with your certification exam 🙂

entry.title: Re: What replaces deprecated Scope Item 19C?
entry.content:
Hi @johntebbitt ,

There seems to be some confusion regarding the status of 19C in the next release of Private Cloud Edition. Currently, there is no official message indicating that 19C will be deprecated in the forthcoming release. Therefore, "what might replace 19C" is not a question with answer at this moment.

It’s important to note that the features and updates you see in the Public Cloud Edition do NOT necessarily reflect what will happen in the Private Cloud Edition. Specifically, the scope item 19C, "Activity Management in Procurement," is unique to S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition, and is not available in the Public Edition.

I hope this helps clarify your concerns.

Best Regards,
Fancy

entry.title: Re: Reset Repair flag into transport request / object was repaired in system / SE03
entry.content: Thanks

entry.title: Re: Delete duplicate customers in SAP CDC
entry.content: @samuelyang, Thanks for these resources.

entry.title: Re: BAPI_PO_CHANGE
entry.content: Please debug and check your Commit has triggered.

entry.title: Re: Substituir lista de condição de pagamentos SAP Busine...
entry.content:
Hi,

Yes, this is possible. In fact, according to your screenshot, you already have a formatted search in the field.

It would require a query, that takes your "Active" user defined field into account.

The only thing is, the user has to click on the formatted search icon, instead of the normal choices button.

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: Re: J2EE Instance does not start while while installing N...
entry.content:
Thank you for your answer. I already did several full restarts and we also set the server to a snapshot that was only OS Installation without even database. I attached the last parts of the logfile.

INFO 2024-07-23 15:54:53.436 (root/sapinst)
Output of /usr/sap/S01/SCS02/exe/sapcontrol -prot NI_HTTP -nr 01 -function GetProcessList is written to the logfile sapcontrol_S01_J01.log.

entry.title: Re: Trigger a Counter based Maintenance Plan based on Usa...
entry.content: It appears that you must enter an Annual Estimate on the Measurement Point to allow for the usage of the Measurement Point on a Maintenance Plan. My concern with this is that the end users do not know AND from a bit of experience with Measurement Points used on Maintenance Plans, SAP will try to "predict" in the future when the Maintenance Plan is due. We do not want that, we simply want SAP to generate a Work Order from a Maintenance Plan when the equipment has been used exactly 6 times. These 6 times could come in any time frame (1 month, 6 months, 1 year, possibly never).

entry.title: How to increase report generation size limit in learning module in SAP
entry.content:
When trying to generate report in learning module, I am getting this error "

The report exceeds the maximum size limit of (20,971,520 bytes). Use additional filter criteria to reduce the report size and try again.

How to increase report generation size limit in learning module in HCM

entry.title: Re: Sales Contracts in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud_order qua...
entry.content:
Hi @thangarajthomas ,

In addition to @Andy_Wang's  answer, I kindly recommend submitting your requirement as an enhancement request on the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Sales - All Requests | Customer Influence (sap.com). This will allow your request to be considered for future standard support.

As of now, this is a relatively new request for us, and there are no similar entries in the influence portal. Your submission would help us gauge wider interest and potentially prioritize this enhancement.

Best Regards,
Fancy

entry.title: Re: Error when I upgrade HANA database from ver: 2402 to 2405
entry.content: 1) Gentle Reminder

entry.title: Re: Why is the message ME046 not being set to Error in transaction codes IW31?(In release pros.)
entry.content: @peter_atkin

entry.title: Re: STO between a plant that is Automatic Batch Split Val...
entry.content:
Hello @cloud_delict 

STO process can determine valuation type at the time of goods issue. With that valuation type in a STO item is not required - see the note 1677707 - Determining the valuation type for stock transport orders at the time of GI I'm not sure if that process is going to work in your case though. Your batches have different valuation types in both plants. Thus that falls under the restriction #6 from the note. 

You have to try that. If this doesn't work, you need to enter as many STO items as batches sent.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Answer text editor strange behavior
entry.content:
I have been able to duplicate all strange behavior described, by using the browser's page translation function.

It appears that once the question has been translated, the browser function wil also actively try to translate any text that you write in the answer text editor, while you are typing. Apparently this includes punctuation, but it all depends on what language was originally translated.

Please note, that I use Microsoft Edge. I cannot say for sure if the same behavior happens in other browsers.

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: Re: Dispatcher does not start after Refresh database
entry.content:
Yes, possible issue: test and production machines aren't on the same network, causing a database connection timeout. This could be due to network issues, firewall settings, or incorrect configuration.

For Troubleshooting, please check below:
1. Verify network connectivity by pinging the database server from the application server.
2. Check firewall settings on both servers to ensure necessary port communication.
3. Confirm database is configured to accept connections from the application server, including database listener configuration and SAP profile parameters.
4. Ensure the database service is running and listening on the correct port.
5. Verify the SAP profile on the application server is correctly configured.

entry.title: Re: Trigger a Counter based Maintenance Plan based on Usage Count
entry.content:
Greetings.

@JosephFlesche Yes SAP will try to predict this. My advice would be to enter a very high number which will not be reached. Since you are planning to regularly inter measurement documents SAP will ignore annual estimate.

Annual estimate is used to translate "quantity-to-time" and if you regularly enter measurement document this is not required or it is adapted -this is why if you put a high number as annual estimate SAP will will never schedule it just based on that.

Best regards, Matjaž.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano,

This is Chuc - a Vietnamese woman. I’ve been working as a SAP FI Consultant for more than 3 years.

It’s my pleasure to know that you are creating a self-learning environment where SAP companions have opportunities to learn and be certified.

I would like to write these words to express my appreciation to this program and desire to learn more SAP topics. I also hope that my future achievement will be a motivation for my colleagues.

Thanks for considering my application for the free certification attempt.

Yours sincerely,

entry.title: Re: Task 7 - Using CQL in an unbound function implementation (July Developer Challenge - "Rever
entry.content: Excellent!

entry.title: Re: Task 7 - Using CQL in an unbound function implementation (July Developer Challenge - "Rever
entry.content: Super, that's great to hear!

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA direct connectivity with Event Mesh in Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hi @yassine and @osalas ,

To add the correct certificate to your STRUST:

1. Get the messaging uri from the service key (screenshot in the blog here). This will look like: "wss://<your-account>.eu10.a.eventmesh.integration.cloud.sap/protocols/amqp10ws". Replace the "wss://" part with "https://" and open this url in your browser. You will get "Authorization Header Required" but the browser will now contain your certificate.

2. Download/export this certificate and add it to STRUST under the "SSL Client (standard)". You can find a screenshot of this step here: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/blog-post-sap-event-mesh-s-4hana-on-premise-integration-with-event-mesh/ba-p/13553407

entry.title: Re: Task 7 - Using CQL in an unbound function implementation (July Developer Challenge - "Rever
entry.content: Good work!

entry.title: Re: Planning of activity types in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello Marie,

short answer: I think you can't.

The equivalent of that old ERP functionality on cost center planning has been functionally moved to SAC.

Very unwise decision by SAP, as for most S/4 projects it is an unsurmountable hurdle to introduce SAC just for that purpose.

KR,

Steffen

entry.title: Task 8 - Responding to an OData query with navigation (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content:
This is a task in the July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs".

This time, a simple one that should take you no time! After the previous task where you created a brand new Northbreeze service, complete with data (right?), as well as implementing the first API endpoint in that new service, this task is designed to give you a bit of a break, and to allow you to reflect on the power that CAP gives you out of the box, and on just some of the many wondrous aspects of OData.

Background

With all the functions and actions you've had to define and implement so far, it's easy to forget what CAP gives you for free, when creating and serving services. And in terms of support for OData, a very accomplished and "complete" protocol, it is second to none, particularly with regards to the mechanisms you get for free.

The requirements

Here are the specific requirements for this task. Your Northbreeze service, still served via the OData V4 protocol, must respond appropriately to an OData QUERY operation that expresses a navigation from one entity to a related one, in the resource path. Specifically, it must respond to a request for an entity set of the Products belonging to a particular Supplier (see the Northwind and Northbreeze section of the previous task for details on these entity types).

In other words, your service needs to return an entity set containing products, for a specific supplier.

Some examples

Using the standard Northwind service, here are a couple of examples of that.

First, a list of the products belonging to the supplier with ID 22 ("Zaanse Snoepfabriek"): /Suppliers(22)/Products, which should produce:

{
  "@odata.context": "https://services.odata.org/V4/Northwind/Northwind.svc/$metadata#Products",
  "value": [
    {
      "ProductID": 47,
      "ProductName": "Zaanse koeken",
      "SupplierID": 22,
      "CategoryID": 3,
      "QuantityPerUnit": "10 - 4 oz boxes",
      "UnitPrice": 9.5000,
      "UnitsInStock": 36,
      "UnitsOnOrder": 0,
      "ReorderLevel": 0,
      "Discontinued": false
    },
    {
      "ProductID": 48,
      "ProductName": "Chocolade",
      "SupplierID": 22,
      "CategoryID": 3,
      "QuantityPerUnit": "10 pkgs.",
      "UnitPrice": 12.7500,
      "UnitsInStock": 15,
      "UnitsOnOrder": 70,
      "ReorderLevel": 25,
      "Discontinued": false
    }
  ]
}
Next, the products for supplier "Tokyo Traders" (ID 4), but just the product name and unit price: /Suppliers(4)/Products?$select=ProductName,UnitPrice, which should produce:
{
  "@odata.context": "https://services.odata.org/V4/Northwind/Northwind.svc/$metadata#Products(ProductName,UnitPrice)",
  "value": [
    {
      "ProductName": "Mishi Kobe Niku",
      "UnitPrice": 97.0000
    },
    {
      "ProductName": "Ikura",
      "UnitPrice": 31.0000
    },
    {
      "ProductName": "Longlife Tofu",
      "UnitPrice": 10.0000
    }
  ]
}

Back to the requirements

So your service must do this too. The great thing is, if you've set up your Northbreeze service as I recommended in the previous task (i.e. starting from a clone of the Northbreeze repo, then you're already set, and don't need to do anything specific to have the TESTER successfully test this in your service. That's thanks to the power of CAP.

The service must be served using the OData V4 protocol, with the (default) path prefix /odata/v4 plus the service name northbreeze, and return an entity set of products belonging to a given supplier. Those products must be the correct ones (for example, products "Zaanse koeken" and "Chocolade" are the two products for supplier "Zaanse Snoepfabriek" (ID 22) and have the same IDs as they have in Northwind (as the TESTER will be checking the products returned in the entity set and examining the order of their IDs).

And that's it!

As there is, in theory, nothing more for you to do in this task (except to submit to the TESTER as usual, see below), if you've correctly implemented the service for the previous task already, then why not use the remainder of your coffee time to consider the power of OData, and think about the answers to the following questions:

First, the Northwind service only allows the "traditional" OData key specification in the the resource path, e.g. /Suppliers(7) and not the more recent Key-as-Segment style. Does your Northbreeze service, powered by CAP, support that? What does that look like?

While we're talking about resource paths, what about going one level deeper - is that supported? For example, Northwind supports paths such as /Products(70)/Category/CategoryName to get just the name of the category to which the product with ID 70 belongs. Does CAP support that too - can you do it with your Northbreeze service?

Even what one might think should be single scalar value responses, such as a category name like Beverages, come delivered inside some wrapping, by default in either an XML representation in the case of Northwind (extra whitespace added for readability):

<m:value 
    xmlns:d="http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/ns/data" 
    xmlns:georss="http://www.georss.org/georss" 
    xmlns:gml="http://www.opengis.net/gml" 
    xmlns:m="http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/ns/metadata" 
    m:context="https://services.odata.org/V4/Northwind/Northwind.svc/$metadata#Products(70)/Category/CategoryName">
    Beverages
</m:value>
or in a JSON representation in the case of the CAP powered Northbreeze equivalent:
{
  "@odata.context": "../../$metadata#Categories(1)/CategoryName",
  "value": "Beverages"
}
What if you wanted just the scalar value Beverages? Is that possible? If so, how?

On these questions and any related ones that occur to you - be sure to put your thoughts in the comments below!

Submitting to the TESTER

Now you're ready to submit your CANDIDATE service to the TESTER!

The payload

The task identifier you need to supply in the payload of your submission is: northbreeze-Products.

You'll have already done this sort of thing previously so just head back there for the more detailed instructions if you need them, or to the the section titled "The Tester service, and making a test request" in the main challenge blog post.

You'll need to submit a JSON payload like this:

{
  "communityid": "<your-community-id>",
  "serviceurl": "<the-URL-of-your-service>",
  "task": "northbreeze-Products"
}
And, just as with the previous (and all further tasks):

  • the value for the communityid property should be your ID on this SAP Community platform (e.g. mine is "qmacro")

  • the value for the serviceurl property should be the absolute URL (i.e. including the scheme), of your CANDIDATE service.

That's it!

Logging of test results

Remember that you can check on your progress, and the progress of your fellow participants - all requests are logged and are available in an entity set served by the TESTER service. The entity set URL is https://developer-challenge-2024-07.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/tester/Testlog and being an OData V4 entity set, all the normal OData system query options are available to you for digging into that information.

Until the next task, have fun, and if you have any questions or comments, leave them below!

entry.title: Re: Trigger a Counter based Maintenance Plan based on Usa...
entry.content:
Based on feedback from this thread and continuing to search and test for a solution, I finally figured it out. Here's how you have to setup the data.

Setup the Measurement Point like this.

Then setup the Maintenance Plan like this.

The key appears to be the very short Scheduling Period so that SAP does not look too far in advance and generate Work Orders way ahead of when the equipment was actually used. Also keeping the Annual Estimate very low helps with not assuming too much usage in a year so that SAP does not over predict the usage and Call a Work Order too early.

This post was also very helpful.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud - Sum
entry.content:
Forgive me for not explaining correctly. I'll give an example in order to help. If I were to select the Product code as a dimension, the result would be an error stating that there are hidden elements. From my understanding and testing, this is attributed to the fact that for a single Product Code there are more than one entries with different prices and even different Billing Documents. My issue is how do I make SAC sum all of the different prices per product code and have it show those. Without using the Billing Document or any other filter at least without it being visible in my table. I've assumed it cannot be done through SAC and maybe my CDS query is supposed to aggregate.

My CDS consumption view is built on a CDS Cube. I have only used @Aggregation.default.

entry.title: Re: Flexible Workflow for PR
entry.content: @Neha_s, Can you explain how was it resolved?

entry.title: Re: Trigger a Counter based Maintenance Plan based on Usa...
entry.content: Thank you all. I was able to solve this and test it. I added a solution.

entry.title: Re: How to see which function module is responsible for filling the outbound idoc during BCM?
entry.content: Thank you, Miha... But there is no process code or FM associated with this message type/partner type in WE20... Is there any other way I can find the responsible FM?

entry.title: SAP Build Apps : MARKETPLACEからダウンロードしたListコンポーネントの任意更新
entry.content:
SAP Build AppsのMARKETPLACEには様々なコンポーネントが存在します。その中でもLIST系のコンポーネントはデータを表示する際に使用するので使用頻度が高いのではと思います。

大体のこれらのコンポーネントにはRefresh Data?とRefresh rateというプロパティが存在し、

Refresh Data?をTrueにすると、Refresh rateのタイミングでリストの内容を再取得し、更新します。

これを"更新ボタンをクリックしたら更新"など任意のタイミングで行えないか？というお問い合わせを頂きましたので、方法を解説したいと思います。

  1. まず、App Variable等でtrue/false型の変数を作成します。ディフォルトはfalseにしておくとよいでしょう。
  2. この変数をリストコンポーネントのRefreshData?プロパティに割り当てます。

     

    これだけで出来るのかと思った方、残念ながらそうではないのです。
  3. ここからが意外と知られていないことなのですが、このリストコンポーネントのロジックに手を加えます。

    このアイコンをクリックしテンプレートエディタを開きます。

    テンプレートエディタではコンポーネントの内部を編集することが可能です。デザインを変えたりも出来ますので結構楽しいですよ。
    テンプレートエディタの下部にあるAdd logic to xxxxxxListをクリックし、ロジック編集に入ります。
  4. これは私愛用のSCROLLABLE ICON LISTのものですが、このようにこのListのロジックが表示されます。結構勉強になるのでどの様に動いているか見ても良いでしょう。

    このロジック、よく見るとComponent mountedイベントをきっかけに動作し、データを取得し、そこでRefresh Data?プロパティがTrueであるならRefresh rate分Delayを行い再度データ取得を行うというロジックです。そうなのです。実はこのロジックではRefresh Data?プロパティの値の変更はTrue→Falseへの変更は反映されますがFalse→Trueへの変更してもデータの再取得は反映されないのです。

  5. Refresh Data?プロパティの値の変更でデータを取得するようにするにはどうしたらよいか？様々な方法が考えられます。私も各人と話し合いましたが簡単なのは

    Receive Eventコントロールを新規に配置し、Event Sourceとして"Internal property 'Refresh Data?' changed"を選択します。これをGet Record Collectionに接続します。

    これにより、Refresh Data?プロパティが変更されたらGet Record Collectionが動作することになります。
  6. 更新ボタン側は簡単です。

    このようにRefresh Data?プロパティに割り当てたtrue/false型変数を、更新したいのであればTrueにしてその後すぐにFalseに戻します。これで"Internal property 'Refresh Data?' changed"イベントが動作し、データがリフレッシュされ、リストが新しい値で更新されます。


    注意：よく見ればわかりますが、上記の変更では実はRefresh Data?プロパティに設定した変数をFalseに変更したときもデータのリフレッシュはかかります。これが気になるのであれば"Internal property 'Refresh Data?' changed"イベントのあとにIF conditionを挟んでTrueのときだけ動作するというロジックに変更して下さい。


このようにすれば任意のタイミングでリストの更新が可能です。Refresh Data?による自動更新では満足できない場合はこの方法をぜひお試し頂ければと思います。

entry.title: Re: Trigger a Counter based Maintenance Plan based on Usage Count
entry.content: I do not want SAP to predict this. I want SAP to Call a Work Order once 6 times has been achieved. Not in advance of the usage. I was able to solve this and test it. I added a solution. The key appears to be the 1 day Scheduling Period so that SAP does not look into the future.

entry.title: Do any other methods for recovering data from a corrupted PST file if normal restoration methods fai
entry.content: If conventional repair methods are unable to do so for various reasons you need to use the best tool to recover data from your corrupted PST file. Outlook PST Repair Software by Softaken is a powerful tool that successfully recovers PST file data that are badly damaged or unavailable. This Outlook PST file data repair can handle many issues and problems considering file sizes that are really large and size restrictions that cannot be resolved by normal methods. This tool scans and repairs PST files by extracting PST email data and other inbox data properly. Because of this, even people with less technical expertise can use it. This program will safely restore your important Outlook data whatever the reason for the damage - hardware malfunction, software error, or accidental damage.

entry.title: Re: Display of page map fails
entry.content:
Hello,

I had the same problem with a Fiori Elements App, but mine was based on an OData V4 Service, and found this explanation in the SAP Community:
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/sap-fiori-application-model-page-map-not-loading/qaq-p/12674786

However, their solution of updating the ux-specification package did not help in my case. For me, the page map didn't load right after the application generator created the app, even without any changes on my side. Therefore I determined that the CDS View was probably configured falsely and tried it with a different OData Service --> worked.

Greetings

Miguel

entry.title: Re: How to Create Deeplinks by using Specific Tab URL in...
entry.content:
Hi  AliAkbalik , 

   If your 'tab' refers to 'page' in SAC story, you can add page parameter into the URL: 

  1. Get the URL of story: go to story -> share -> copy the default link from there. 
  2. Add '?page=x' (x = page number) to the end of the link. 

   You can get more information from this help page: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/a4406994704e4af5a8559a640b496468/fe8d560fce4f4fdd8445455f8effd3c0.html

Best regards, William

entry.title: Re: Creating namespace using 'AIF/CUST' Tcode giving 'Thi...
entry.content: One would assume that AIF is simply not present on your system. If you're not on S/4, you have to install it explicitly (see this page here: https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/application-interface-framework).

entry.title: SAP Business One Customer Overpayment Allocation
entry.content:
Dear SAP Business One Experts,

I have a situation where I am getting some excess payments from our customers. I need to transfer it to a Specific GL account in the same receipt (Incoming payment)

Eg: Outstanding Invoice is 100 USD, Customer pays 102 USD. I need to transfer excess payment of 2 USD to a GL account in the same incoming payment and  GL entries should be generated as follows

Bank Dr 103, Customer Cr 100 and assigned GL account Cr 3

 

Thanks in Advance

Sam

entry.title: Re: Guide to configurate and customize SAP CPM
entry.content:
You can refer CPM administrators guide on below link.

chrome-extension://efaidnbmnnnibpcajpcglclefindmkaj/https://help.sap.com/doc/9c96da5fbedc460fbb3aa5946bdc1be6/2.0.07/en-US/Admin_Guide_CPD_2_0_SP07.pdf

You can also refer below link for CPM contents:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_COMMERCIAL_PROJECT_MANAGEMENT_S4H

entry.title: Re: Delete duplicate customers in SAP CDC
entry.content:
Hello @carlos_riva,

In this case of duplicate data, only one user will have the email address as a login identifier, while for the remaining duplicate email users, it'll be listed under email addresses since the CDC System Design does not permit duplicates.

To clean up all those contacts without loginIDs, you can use a Dataflow with the following steps:

  1. Identify users with blank login identifiers.
  2.  For the list obtained in step-1, check if any users have the email address as their login identifier.

I hope this answers your query to close the thread.

Thanks and Regards,
Kunal Bansal
SAP CX Solution Architect

entry.title: Re: LTMC material uploading error
entry.content: Hi please check if it's internal number range or external number range when loading the Material master data. It's probably because internal number range, a new material number was generated.

entry.title: Re: SAP DM - ERP - EWM Integration/Staging Problems
entry.content: Hello Manoel and many thanks for the guides. Is there anything special to consider with an embedded ewm? I have followed the guides again to the best of my knowledge, unfortunately without success. I'll let you know if I find out anything. BR

entry.title: Re: Converting Amount into Words using JavaScript in Adobe
entry.content:
Thank you Vrushali, for this detailed and insightful post. The JavaScript program you provided for converting amounts into words according to the Indian currency format was exactly what I needed. It worked perfectly in my Adobe forms and resolved the limitations I was facing with FormCalc. Your explanation and examples were very clear and helpful.

Thanks again for sharing this solution!

Best regards,
Nithesh

entry.title: Re: Report layout not showing in BPC Add ins using with EPM
entry.content: Thanks very much. Once we reinstall the Office 365 that problem is resolved.

entry.title: Re: BOM Explosion in Delivery without Reference to Sales...
entry.content:
Hi Emanuele,

According to my expert, it's not possible to achieve what you're asking in S/4HANA Cloud, and there is also no plan to support it in standard, and it couldn't be done via customer configuration.

However, you can start your process from Sales Order, not from outbound delivery directly.

It would be also helpful for the discussion if you can share why you can’t start from Sales Order in your process.

Best Regards,

Sean

entry.title: Re: SAP DM - ERP - EWM Integration/Staging Problems
entry.content: Hello, and thank you for your answer. I do not receive the staging method on the DM side. Im guessing its an connection problem (e.g. data inconsistency) in the BTP/CPI. The configurations in the SOAMANAGER seem to work, at least thats what the Ping Web Service tells me.

entry.title: Re: BOM Explosion in Delivery without Reference to Sales...
entry.content: Hi Emanuele, According to my expert, it's not possible to achieve what you're asking in S/4HANA Cloud, and there is also no plan to support it in standard, and it couldn't be done via customer configuration. However, you can start your process from Sales Order, not from outbound delivery directly. It would be also helpful for the discussion if you can share why you can’t start from Sales Order in your process. Best Regards, Sean

entry.title: Re: ATC Check error - The SELECT command is executed on the database (SELECT 694)
entry.content: SELECT ##ITAB_DB_SELECT DI_CODE, COUNT( MATNR ) AS MATNR_COUNT FROM @LT_LIPS_MARA AS LIPS_MARA GROUP BY DI_CODE INTO TABLE @DATA(LT_SUMMARY).

entry.title: Re: TAN as higher level item category for Sales Order Typ...
entry.content: Hi Sam, According to my expert, it's not possible to achieve what you're asking in S/4HANA Cloud, and there is also no plan to support it in standard, and it couldn't be done via customer configuration. However, you can think about to try the sales kit functionality which is covered with scope item 31Q. Best Regards, Sean

entry.title: Re: Report layout not showing in BPC Add ins using with EPM
entry.content:
Please ask your local IT team install office 365. I think it will resolve the problem. Also check below setting.

Thanks and Regards,

Venkat.

entry.title: UI5 Tooling 4.0
entry.content:
UI5 Tooling 4.0

The UI5 Core team is pleased to announce the release of UI5 Tooling 4.0.

This release has a strong focus on enabling UI5 2.x compatibility for projects. In addition, we introduced a new feature for automatically generating locale information in the manifest.json. Along with some important housekeeping.

We are doing our best to minimize upgrade efforts for UI5 developers. Projects currently working with UI5 Tooling 3.x are generally expected to work with UI5 Tooling 4.0. More on this below.

Node.js and npm Requirements

UI5 Tooling 4.0 requires Node.js v20.11.0, v22.0.0, or higher.

This allows us to make use of the latest Node.js features and to upgrade dependencies requiring current Node.js versions.

Specification Version 4.0

This new major Specification Version comes with breaking changes that might have an impact on projects. Please carefully read the migration guide before applying the new version to your projects.

These changes are mostly related to how bundles are created in UI5 Tooling. Even if you do not use custom bundles, this might have an impact on the initial loading behavior of your application or library. These changes pave the road for future improvements on bundling in UI5. Stay tuned for more!

UI5 2.x

UI5 Tooling 4.0 along with the new Specification Version 4.0 is required for projects to utilize UI5 2.x.

When defining Specification Version 4.0 in your project, the code generated by UI5 Tooling will apply all the current best practices, such as consistently loading resources asynchronously and terminating the use of "eval()" (a common CSP violation). Both of which are prerequisites for projects to be compatible with UI5 2.x.

New Feature: Automatic Generation of Locale Information

In your application or library project, UI5 Tooling will now analyze existing manifest.json files. For any "i18n" and "ResourceModel" configurations, it will ensure that the "supportedLocales" property is defined. If it is not defined, it will be filled automatically based on the translation files present in the project.

This will improve user experience by avoiding unnecessary requests at runtime. Without a defined set of "supported locales", UI5 runtime has to determine the available translations by requesting individual files, often resulting in "404 Not Found" server responses.

Note that you can opt out of this behavior by defining the "supportedLocales" property yourself. The feature is active for both, the build and the server.

Learn more about this new feature in the builder documentation.

Upgrade Today

Upgrading to UI5 Tooling 4.0 is a straightforward task for most projects.

First, ensure you meet the minimum required versions of Node.js and npm using the commands "node --version" and "npm --version". Make sure to also check your CI/CD workflows.

Then upgrade the UI5 CLI in your project by executing the following command:

npm i --save-dev @ui5/cli@latest

Also update your global install using:

npm i --global @ui5/cli@latest

You may already stop there, since updating the Specification Version remains optional.

However, if you want UI5 Tooling to apply the current best practices when building your project, also update the "specVersion" property in all ui5.yaml files to "4.0": 

 

specVersion: "4.0"
[...]

 

Afterwards, test your project as usual. In case any problems come up, make sure to check our migration guide. And if you need further assistance, we invite you to raise an issue on GitHub.

entry.title: Re: Error when I upgrade HANA database from ver: 2402 to...
entry.content:
Hi Krish_SAP

1. Please check and  make sure, the database user that used for upgrade process has privilege assigned according to the guide : https://help.sap.com/doc/4e7c047f2c9e4cbe97800ffaf7b68f8e/10.0/en-US/B1_for_SAP_HANA_Admin_Guide.pdf

Please make sure the database user has BACKUP ADMIN and BACKUP OPERATOR privilege and then try again.

Granting Roles and Privileges to Database Users follow steps as below:
- In the SAP HANA studio, connect to your system as a superuser (for example, SYSTEM).
- In the Administration Console, under the Security folder of your system, under Users, double-click the database user, then details of the database user get displayed on the right.
- In the right panel, add required roles or privileges.
- To apply the changes, click (Deploy) or press F 8

2. Please backup and remove SBO-COMMON database, attempt to upgrade again.
Also, you can install or upgrade only the SLD components and company database as first step(but not repository), and then, perform the steps detailed in the SAP NOTE 1455344 - How to Recreate the SBO-COMMON Database in SAP Business One to re-create the repository.

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh
SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Renumber G/L Accounts, mapping value is in Released m...
entry.content: I completed renumbering for one G/L in Dev. But the G/L number did not change. And I released the mapping by mistake. Now when I try to create new mapping. It says previous one is still in progress. What should I do?

entry.title: Re: How to do authorization check for personnel no (PERNR...
entry.content: HI

entry.title: Customization IMG tree wiped out after 2023 FPS01 Upgrade
entry.content:
Hello all,

each time we have carried out a 2023 FPS01 upgrade, the customization tree gets wiped out, totally deleted, does anyone know why and how it can be prevented ?

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA FUNDS MANAGEMENT-Part 2 (what’s in it for private owned Customers)
entry.content:
Dear @gianluca_taccone,

thanks for the document.

I have a question: in our case we load only the next year budget (as it's approved yearly), but for some OPEX, like maintenance, we have multi-year contracts.

So, let's say, in oct-2024 we got 2025's budget and in dec-2024 we signed a contract covering 2025-2027 (essentially, assuming we'll get enough budget the following years).

My client wants the budget to be checked only for 2025 (at least, till 2026 budget is approved and loaded).

I see different issues in this approach (mainly on purchase requests/purchase order level: how can the system know which period each line refers to? and if the same line covers different years?).

I was wondering if you ever had such a situation (timing in your 4th scenario is considered, but it assumes we have a multiyear budget, which we don't).

Your hints would be much appreciated.


Best

Marco

entry.title: Fiori App F2359 Error: Target was not found
entry.content:
When opening Fiori App F2359 an error come up:

Target was not found 

sap.ui.generic.app.navigation.service.NavigationHandler is not a constructor

 

OData-services + SICF services were checked....also in F12 DEV mode of MS Edge.

Do you have an idea?

Thanks a lot.

Best regards,

Henning
